sites.context: updateClassInstance — shouldUpdate=true branch: if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot
updateClassInstance — shouldUpdate=false (bail-out) branch: if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot
updateClassInstance — force-update/context-change branch: if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot

purpose: The reconciler marks a class component fiber with the Snapshot flag whenever the component instance defines getSnapshotBeforeUpdate, so the commit phase knows to call that lifecycle before DOM mutations.
